prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(report_safety_incident manufacturing_site_a)
(assign_response_role manufacturing_site_a response_role_investigator)
(assign_sample_to_incident manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(confirm_incident_after_sample manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(flag_contaminant_indicator_on_site manufacturing_site_a contaminant_indicator_1 sample_001)
(attach_containment_asset_to_incident manufacturing_site_a containment_quarantine_area_1)
(apply_containment_and_stabilize_site manufacturing_site_a contaminant_indicator_1 containment_quarantine_area_1)
(report_safety_incident distribution_site_a)
(assign_response_role distribution_site_a response_role_lead)
(release_sample_from_incident manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(assign_sample_to_incident distribution_site_a sample_001)
(confirm_incident_after_sample distribution_site_a sample_001)
(create_recall_scope_for_distribution_node distribution_site_a recall_scope_region_1 sample_001)
(detach_containment_asset_from_incident manufacturing_site_a containment_quarantine_area_1)
(attach_containment_asset_to_incident distribution_site_a containment_quarantine_area_1)
(allocate_containment_asset_to_distribution_site distribution_site_a recall_scope_region_1 containment_quarantine_area_1)
(stage_recall_event_standard manufacturing_site_a distribution_site_a contaminant_indicator_1 recall_scope_region_1 recall_event_initial)
(release_sample_from_incident distribution_site_a sample_001)
(assign_sample_to_incident manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(process_staged_recall_event recall_event_initial manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(authorize_site_return_to_operation manufacturing_site_a recall_event_initial)
(authorize_distribution_site_return_to_operation distribution_site_a recall_event_initial)
(dispatch_incident_communications manufacturing_site_a comms_template_regulator_notification sample_001)
(complete_site_recovery_and_release_role manufacturing_site_a response_role_investigator comms_template_regulator_notification)
(release_sample_from_incident manufacturing_site_a sample_001)
(assign_sample_to_incident distribution_site_a sample_001)
(dispatch_incident_communications distribution_site_a comms_template_regulator_notification sample_001)
(complete_distribution_recovery_and_release_role distribution_site_a response_role_lead comms_template_regulator_notification)
(detach_containment_asset_from_incident distribution_site_a containment_quarantine_area_1)
(release_sample_from_incident distribution_site_a sample_001)
(report_safety_incident coordination_team_alpha)
(assign_response_role coordination_team_alpha response_role_investigator)
(assign_sample_to_incident coordination_team_alpha sample_001)
(confirm_incident_after_sample coordination_team_alpha sample_001)
(tag_production_batch coordination_team_alpha production_batch_1001 recall_event_initial)
(obtain_team_approval_for_batch coordination_team_alpha production_batch_1001 recall_event_initial sample_001)
(allocate_testing_capability_to_team coordination_team_alpha testing_capability_internal_assay_1)
(attach_containment_asset_to_incident coordination_team_alpha containment_quarantine_area_1)
(perform_team_testing_and_quality_checks coordination_team_alpha testing_capability_internal_assay_1 containment_quarantine_area_1 production_batch_1001 recall_event_initial)
(allocate_contract_laboratory_to_team coordination_team_alpha contract_lab_centre_1)
(complete_contract_laboratory_testing_and_prepare_signoff coordination_team_alpha contract_lab_centre_1 production_batch_1001 recall_event_initial)
(finalize_team_recovery_signoff coordination_team_alpha)
(dispatch_incident_communications coordination_team_alpha comms_template_regulator_notification sample_001)
(complete_team_recovery_and_release_role coordination_team_alpha response_role_investigator comms_template_regulator_notification)
(release_sample_from_incident coordination_team_alpha sample_001)
(release_testing_capability_from_team coordination_team_alpha testing_capability_internal_assay_1)
(release_contract_laboratory_from_team coordination_team_alpha contract_lab_centre_1)
(detach_containment_asset_from_incident coordination_team_alpha containment_quarantine_area_1)
(report_safety_incident coordination_team_beta)
(assign_response_role coordination_team_beta response_role_lead)
(assign_sample_to_incident coordination_team_beta sample_001)
(confirm_incident_after_sample coordination_team_beta sample_001)
(tag_production_batch coordination_team_beta production_batch_1002 recall_event_initial)
(obtain_team_approval_for_batch coordination_team_beta production_batch_1002 recall_event_initial sample_001)
(allocate_testing_capability_to_team coordination_team_beta testing_capability_internal_assay_1)
(attach_containment_asset_to_incident coordination_team_beta containment_quarantine_area_1)
(perform_team_testing_and_quality_checks coordination_team_beta testing_capability_internal_assay_1 containment_quarantine_area_1 production_batch_1002 recall_event_initial)
(allocate_contract_laboratory_to_team coordination_team_beta contract_lab_centre_1)
(complete_contract_laboratory_testing_and_prepare_signoff coordination_team_beta contract_lab_centre_1 production_batch_1002 recall_event_initial)
(finalize_team_recovery_signoff coordination_team_beta)
(dispatch_incident_communications coordination_team_beta comms_template_regulator_notification sample_001)
(complete_team_recovery_and_release_role coordination_team_beta response_role_lead comms_template_regulator_notification)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a pharmaceutical crisis response staging scenario. The goal is to get manufacturing_site_a, distribution_site_a, coordination_team_alpha, and coordination_team_beta back to operation, meaning (entity_return_to_operation) for each.


## Addressing Operational Goals  
- The scenario focuses on resolving a pharmaceutical crisis by restoring key entities to operation.  
- Entities involved include manufacturing_site_a, distribution_site_a, coordination_team_alpha, and coordination_team_beta.  
- The goal is to ensure each entity returns to full operational status (entity_return_to_operation).  
- This requires coordinated efforts to address potential disruptions in the supply chain.  
- Initial steps involve assessing current operational states and identifying barriers to recovery.

## Analyzing Entity Recovery Steps  
- Entity recovery involves complete_site_recovery for sites and complete_team_recovery_and_release_role for teams, both requiring communications_sent and operational_signoff_for_entity.  
- For sites, signoff comes from authorize_site_return_to_operation or authorize_distribution, linked to recall_event_processed.  
- For teams, signoff involves finalize_team_recovery_signoff, publish_recovery_signoff, and finalize_regulatory_signoff actions.  
- The process is complex, suggesting a structured path for restoring operations.  
- Teams alpha and beta are linked to different regulatory notices (1 and 2), but notice_2 is unavailable, complicating team recovery.

## Examining Resource Constraints  
- Only one sample_001 and one containment are available, likely requiring shared use across incidents.  
- Actions like assign_sample_to_incident and release_sample_from_incident suggest samples are reassigned after use.  
- Three roles (investigator, lead, liaison) must cover four incidents, likely requiring sequential processing and role reuse via release.  
- Contract_lab_centre_1 and internal_assay_1 are available, potentially supporting incident handling but with limited resources.  
- Resource sharing adds complexity, requiring careful sequencing to meet the goal of returning all entities to operation.

## Outlining Initial Actions  
- Start by reporting safety incidents for all entities: manufacturing_site_a, distribution_site_a, coordination_team_alpha, and coordination_team_beta.  
- Assign roles using assign_response_role, which consumes roles until released, necessitating sequential processing.  
- Link sample_001 to incidents via assign_sample_to_incident, then confirm incidents to achieve entity_confirmed status.  
- For manufacturing sites, stabilization may involve attaching containment and applying containment measures, pending further details.

## Managing Containment and Stabilization  
- Containment assets like containment_quarantine_area_1 can be detached from one incident and attached to another, such as moving from manufacturing_site_a to distribution_site_a.  
- Actions like allocate_containment_asset_to_distribution_site set stabilized and distrib_mitigation_recorded, ensuring both sites are stabilized with indicator_flagged and recall_scope_ready.  

## Staging and Processing Recall Events  
- Stage recall events using stage_recall_event_standard, requiring stabilized sites, mitigation records, and flagged indicators, leading to recall_event_staged.  
- Process staged recalls with process_staged_recall_event, needing sample linkage to manufacturing_site_a, achieved by releasing and reassigning sample_001.  

## Authorizing Operational Return  
- Authorize site return with authorize_site_return_to_operation, needing stabilized status, mitigation records, and processed recalls, resulting in operational_signoff_for_entity.  
- Similarly, authorize_distribution_site_return_to_operation ensures distribution sites meet the same conditions for operational signoff.  

## Planning Team Recovery  
- Teams alpha and beta require processing, likely involving similar steps like reporting, role assignment, and regulatory signoffs, given their linkage to regulatory notices.  
- The unavailability of regulatory_notice_2 for team beta may complicate recovery, requiring additional steps to finalize_team_recovery_signoff.

## Handling Team Alpha Recovery  
- Allocate testing capability and containment assets to coordination_team_alpha for quality checks, ensuring entity confirmation and availability.  
- Perform team testing and prepare signoff, completing quality checks and readiness for operational signoff without regulatory requirements.  

## Finalizing Team Alpha Operations  
- Finalize team recovery signoff for coordination_team_alpha, ensuring readiness and no logistics needs, leading to operational signoff.  
- Dispatch incident communications and complete recovery, releasing roles and returning to operations for coordination_team_alpha.  

## Preparing Team Beta Recovery  
- Report and assign roles for coordination_team_beta, releasing and reassigning sample_001 from alpha to beta for incident linkage.  
- Tag production_batch_1002 for coordination_team_beta, ensuring batch availability and linkage to recall_event_initial for further processing.

## Managing Sample Assignments  
- Assign sample_001 to distribution_site_a for incident confirmation, ensuring linkage for recall scope creation.  
- Release and reassign sample_001 between manufacturing_site_a and distribution_site_a as needed for staged recalls and processing.  

## Stabilizing Distribution Sites  
- Detach containment assets from manufacturing_site_a and attach to distribution_site_a for stabilization, recording mitigation.  
- Allocate containment assets to distribution_site_a under recall_scope_region_1, preparing for staging.  

## Staging and Processing Recalls  
- Stage recall events using standard procedures for both manufacturing_site_a and distribution_site_a, linked to recall_event_initial.  
- Process staged recalls at manufacturing_site_a, requiring sample_001 linkage, leading to authorization for site operations.  

## Authorizing Site Operations  
- Authorize return to operation for both manufacturing_site_a and distribution_site_a after recall processing, achieving operational signoff.  
- Ensure sample_001 and containment assets are managed appropriately to finalize site recovery.  

## Dispatching Communications  
- Dispatch incident communications for manufacturing_site_a using comms_template_regulator_notification, requiring sample_001 linkage.  
- Release and reassign sample_001 to distribution_site_a for similar communication dispatch, completing recovery steps.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
